user.title: Balansun
user.description: Connect to one router REST API (MQTT remains the default). Add the integration again for each additional router. After setup, use **Configure** for integration mode and refresh interval; use **Reconfigure** (⋮ menu) to change the router URL or API token.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Balansun
reconfigure.description: Change the router base URL or API token. Leave API token empty to keep the current token.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach /api/v1/public on the router (check URL and network)

abort.already_configured: This router URL is already configured

init.title: Balansun options
init.description:
**REST only** is the default — full entity set via REST polling. Switch to **Companion** only when MQTT discovery is already active on this router (avoids duplicate sensors; HACS adds action buttons only: republish discovery, run self-test, reboot). Changing the mode reloads entities immediately.

---

Lower refresh interval = more responsive sensors; higher = less load on the router LAN. Availability behavior on failed polls is configurable below.

data.skip_unavailable_on_failure: Skip unavailable state on failed refresh
data.failure_count_until_unavailable: Failed refreshes before unavailable (skip mode, 0 = never)

options.rest_only: REST only (default) — Full entity set via REST polling (sensors, vacation, triac, actions, …).
options.companion: Companion — MQTT discovery already active: HACS adds action buttons only (republish discovery, run self-test, reboot device; no duplicate sensors).
